vocab.meaning: những cảnh quan đẹp đến nín thở
vocab.example: I would love to hike through the Swiss Alps, as the trail offers breathtaking vistas of snow-capped peaks at every turn.
I am drawn to the idea of trekking across an unspoilt wilderness where nature remains untouched by modern infrastructure.
Instead of a strenuous hike, I’d prefer a leisurely stroll along the Seine in Paris to admire the historical architecture.

vocab.meaning: trung tâm đô thị sầm uất
vocab.example: Walking through a major metropolitan hub like Tokyo would be fascinating due to the sheer energy and neon-lit streets.

vocab.meaning: bờ biển gồ ghề, hiểm trở
vocab.example: There is something incredibly therapeutic about navigating a rugged coastline and feeling the spray of the ocean.

vocab.meaning: cây cối xanh tươi mướt mắt
vocab.example: I would relish the chance to wander through a national park surrounded by lush greenery and the sound of birdsong.

vocab.meaning: những con phố lát đá cuội
vocab.example: Exploring the cobbled streets of an old European town on foot allows you to soak up the history much better than by car.

vocab.meaning: thử thách sức bền của ai đó
vocab.example: A long walk through the desert would certainly test one’s stamina, but the sense of achievement would be unparalleled.
I’ve always wanted to lose myself in the silence of a dense woodland, away from the constant notifications of my phone.
After a three-hour climb, reaching the summit provides a panoramic view of the entire valley below.
